# Welcome to the Test Site

This is a simple site built with Geoff. It demonstrates how Geoff transforms
plain Markdown with TOML frontmatter into semantically rich HTML with embedded
structured data.

## What's Inside

- A [blog](/blog/) with a couple of posts
- An [about](/about/) page

Explore around and see how everything connects.
